name: Quadratt 1U
description: Quad attenuator, attenuverter, mixer, and DC source. Four channels cascade left to right, with each input normalled to +5V for offsets, submixes, and macro CV.

controls.name: Channel Knob A-D
controls.description: Scales or offsets each channel's incoming signal or normalled DC source.

controls.name: Mode Switch A-D
controls.description: Selects attenuator or attenuverter mode for each channel.

inputs.name: IN A
inputs.description: Channel A signal input. Normalled to a precision +5V source when unpatched.

inputs.name: IN B
inputs.description: Channel B signal input. Normalled to a precision +5V source when unpatched.

inputs.name: IN C
inputs.description: Channel C signal input. Normalled to a precision +5V source when unpatched.

inputs.name: IN D
inputs.description: Channel D signal input. Normalled to a precision +5V source when unpatched.

outputs.name: OUT A
outputs.description: Channel A output. When unpatched, acts as the first stage of the cascade.

outputs.name: OUT B
outputs.description: Channel B output. With OUT A empty, it sums channels A and B.

outputs.name: OUT C
outputs.description: Channel C output. With OUT A and OUT B empty, it sums channels A, B, and C.

outputs.name: OUT D
outputs.description: Channel D output. With OUT A, OUT B, and OUT C empty, it sums all four channels.

behaviors.name: Precision offset source
behaviors.description: Each channel receives a normalized +5V reference, so the knob can output a clean DC offset without any external source.

behaviors.name: Cascaded mixing
behaviors.description: The outputs form a left-to-right summing bus. OUT B can be A+B, OUT C can be A+B+C, and OUT D can become the full four-channel mix.

behaviors.name: Bipolar modulation
behaviors.trigger: switch a channel to bipolar mode
behaviors.description: The channel becomes an attenuverter, so the same knob can invert, center, or scale a CV instead of only trimming it.

behaviors.name: Four-knob macro bank
behaviors.trigger: patch multiple destinations from the four outputs
behaviors.description: One panel can drive several destinations with matched offsets or related but independent CV amounts.

patchIdeas.name: Macro CV bank
patchIdeas.patch: LFO to filter cutoff · envelope to VCA CV · two spare channels as DC offsets · one panel handles trim, inversion, and a clean offset source for four destinations.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Quadratt 1U:
* IN A: normalled +5V
* IN B: normalled +5V
* IN C: normalled +5V
* IN D: normalled +5V

LFO:
Envelope:
Filter:
VCA:
VCO:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Quadratt 1U (IN A)
- Envelope (Out) >> Quadratt 1U (IN B)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT A) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT B) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo trim
patchIdeas.patch: Two voices into channels A and B · use OUT A and OUT B as independent trim controls before the mixer · polarity switch on B inverts one side for phase experiments or mid/side style patches.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Quadratt 1U:
* IN A: channel A audio
* IN B: channel B audio
* IN C: normalled +5V
* IN D: normalled +5V

VCO 1:
VCO 2:
Mixer:
Output:

- VCO 1 (Out) -> Quadratt 1U (IN A)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> Quadratt 1U (IN B)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT A) -> Mixer (L)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT B) -> Mixer (R)
- Mixer (Out L) -> Output (L)
- Mixer (Out R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Bipolar filter sweep
patchIdeas.patch: LFO into a bipolar channel and a fixed +5V offset into the next one · OUT C sums the two into a controllable cutoff sweep that can sit above or below center without a separate offset module.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Quadratt 1U:
* IN A: bipolar
* IN B: unpatched
* IN C: normalled +5V
* IN D: normalled +5V

LFO:
Filter:
VCO:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Quadratt 1U (IN A)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT A) >> Quadratt 1U (IN B)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT C) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Four-way voltage fanout
patchIdeas.patch: A sequencer pitch CV fans out to four oscillators with zero re-patching · each channel trims one copy for stacked unison, octave drift, or tiny detune offsets.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Quadratt 1U:
* IN A: pitch bus
* IN B: pitch bus
* IN C: pitch bus
* IN D: pitch bus

Sequencer:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Quadratt 1U (IN A)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT A) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT B) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT C) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Quadratt 1U (OUT D) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)
